name: Sensory Friendly Kids' Chair with Ottoman - Pillowfort™
description: Add a comfy, cute seating option for your kiddo to kick back with the Sensory-Friendly Chair with Ottoman from Pillowfort™. This kids sensory-friendly chair features a velvet covering that lends a soft feel they'll love, with a cushioned construction offering ample comfort as they read a book, watch TV, play a game or just hang out.  The included ottoman is great to prop up legs, but it can also be used as additional seating on its own. A side pocket on the chair provides a convenient spot for your little one to keep books or small essentials close at hand, and you'll appreciate that both pieces are designed in a simple, modern style that will fit right in with the rest of their room decor.
